meta.title: Whale Land — A creative studio building three worlds
meta.description: Discover Korean Birth Type, Haedurio, and C.O.V.E.R.T by Whale Land.

common.externalNotice: You are entering an independent service site.
common.footerLine: Ideas made useful. Experiences made memorable.

home.title: Three different worlds, shaped by one point of view.
home.lead: Whale Land is an independent creative studio designing digital services and physical experiences for self-discovery, travel support, and city exploration.
home.worldsTitle: Three independent services, each with a purpose
home.worldsBody: The homepage introduces the direction of each service. Select one to open its dedicated introduction page, then continue to the official service site.
home.studioTitle: Turning useful ideas into memorable experiences.
home.studioBody: We begin with moments people actually face, not with technology for its own sake. We give useful functions a clear structure, then add story and character to experiences that might otherwise feel ordinary.
home.studioQuote: A good service is understood through experience before explanation.

principles.title: Useful first
principles.body: We solve a real problem first, designing every function and sentence to make the next action clear.

principles.title: Story-led
principles.body: Each service has its own world and voice, giving people a reason to remember it.

principles.title: Built to travel
principles.body: We plan for multiple languages and markets from the beginning, not as an afterthought.

korean-birth-type.title: Korean Birth Type
korean-birth-type.cardTitle: Korean tradition, redesigned for modern self-understanding.
korean-birth-type.summary: A digital card reading that reframes saju as a language for understanding yourself rather than predicting the future.
korean-birth-type.heroTitle: Korean tradition, reimagined as modern self-understanding.
korean-birth-type.heroLead: Korean Birth Type redesigns saju as an interface for understanding yourself, not as a language of fortune-telling.
korean-birth-type.visualCaption: A modern reading system inspired by Korean tradition.
korean-birth-type.statementEyebrow: A DIFFERENT WAY TO READ YOURSELF
korean-birth-type.statementTitle: Not a prediction. A different way to read yourself.
korean-birth-type.statementBody: The experience begins with your birth date and time, but it does not attempt to define your future. It organizes Day Pillar, Five Elements, relationships, wealth, and life rhythms into modern cards that offer a new frame for self-reflection.
korean-birth-type.featuresTitle: Complex interpretation, translated into clear cards

features.title: Your structure, one card at a time
features.body: Day animal, Five Elements, Four Pillars, relationships, and financial patterns are presented in a sequence you can understand.

features.title: A reading designed for mobile
features.body: From input and payment to viewing and saving results, the experience flows naturally on the mobile web.

features.title: One tone across languages
features.body: It preserves its Korean roots while remaining modern, calm, and accessible across markets.

korean-birth-type.processTitle: The calculation stays behind the scenes. The experience stays simple.

steps.title: Enter your details
steps.body: Add your birth date and time.

steps.title: Open your card reading
steps.body: Cards that describe your patterns unfold in sequence.

steps.title: Save and revisit
steps.body: Keep the cards that resonate and return whenever you need them.

korean-birth-type.closingBody: Meet a new language for understanding who you are now, rather than an answer that claims to predict your future.

haedurio.title: Haedurio
haedurio.cardTitle: Local help for the moments that interrupt your trip.
haedurio.summary: A local support service for travel problems in Korea that are difficult to solve alone, from bookings and purchases to deliveries and lost items.
haedurio.heroTitle: When travel gets stuck, local help moves it forward.
haedurio.heroLead: Haedurio helps travelers understand unexpected problems in Korea—bookings, purchases, deliveries, lost items, and more—and find a practical way forward.
haedurio.visualCaption: Local help for the moments that interrupt your trip.
haedurio.statementTitle: Spend less time searching for help, and more time continuing your trip.
haedurio.statementBody: In an unfamiliar language and place, even a small problem can stop an entire day. Haedurio organizes the situation, checks the local context, and helps travelers understand what they can do next.
haedurio.featuresTitle: From explaining the problem to finding the next step

features.title: Make the situation easy to explain
features.body: The service guides travelers to organize the important details, even when the problem feels complicated.

features.title: Check it in the local context
features.body: Possible options are reviewed against how bookings, shopping, and delivery actually work in Korea.

features.title: Connect information to action
features.body: Beyond translation, the service helps clarify what to do next.

haedurio.processTitle: From the moment a problem appears to the moment the trip can continue.

steps.title: Share the situation
steps.body: Tell us what happened and provide the necessary details.

steps.title: Review the options
steps.body: Possible routes and required steps are checked in the local context.

steps.title: Continue with guidance
steps.body: Move forward according to the option you choose.

haedurio.closingTitle: Keep the problem short and the memory long.
haedurio.closingBody: When you need help during a trip to Korea, tell Haedurio what happened.

covert.title: C.O.V.E.R.T
covert.cardTitle: Do not just walk the city. Complete the mission.
covert.summary: A spy-themed stamp tour that turns Seoul into a field operation recorded in a passport-style mission book.
covert.heroTitle: Do not just walk the city. Complete the mission.
covert.heroLead: C.O.V.E.R.T transforms Seoul locations into classified mission zones, inviting travelers to explore, collect evidence, and complete the operation as field agents.
covert.visualCaption: A field mission hidden inside an ordinary city trip.
covert.statementTitle: From checking off attractions to completing a story.
covert.statementBody: The experience does not end with seeing famous places. Open the mission book, find each operational zone, collect stamps and field notes, and turn the entire Seoul trip into one classified assignment.
covert.featuresTitle: A classified operation you can carry

features.title: Passport-style mission book
features.body: A compact physical book contains mission briefings, location intel, and space for field records.

features.title: Fifteen operational zones in Seoul
features.body: Explore tradition, shopping, food, night views, and neighborhoods as distinct assignments.

features.title: Final report and next mission
features.body: Send a final report to HQ and receive intelligence about the next city operation.

covert.processTitle: Receive the briefing. Enter the field. Submit the report.

steps.title: Receive the briefing
steps.body: Review Seoul mission zones and directives in the field book.

steps.title: Conduct field operations
steps.body: Move through the city, collecting stamps and personal field records.

steps.title: Report to HQ
steps.body: Use the final QR code to transmit the mission result.

covert.closingTitle: Seoul is already an operational zone.
covert.closingBody: The independent site for agent registration and final reporting is currently being prepared.
